title: Department Manager Vacancy at Sports Authority India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Sports Authority India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sports Authority India Capital India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sports Authority India Capital India:
Sports Authority India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India Capital India!
